parsed_graph.topology_plan: 1) Remove inbound and outbound edges connected to fac_regulations before removing the node; 2) Remove fac_regulations node itself. Assess if this disconnects risk_operational from all controllable factors or options (ensure at least one path remains to goal via outcomes or risks for all options).

operations.rationale: Removes regulatory complexity as a driver of operational risk per user request.

warnings: risk_operational now only receives input from fac_europe_entry. If you intend operational risk to reflect more sources, consider adding alternative influences.

coaching.summary: Regulatory Complexity and its direct influence on operational risk have been removed. Operational risk is now driven solely by the Europe entry factor. Check that this reflects all the real operational drivers you wish to include.
